title: Regenerative Braking With Power Monitor
description: E-bicycle regenerative braking system with BLDC hub motor in generator mode during braking, INA226 power monitoring, and OLED display showing real-time regen power, energy recovered, and SoC.
objective: Recover 10–30% braking energy; INA226 power accuracy ±0.1%; OLED display regen data; Arduino Mega orchestration; compatible with 48 V 500 W hub motor.
constraints: 48 V Li-Ion; 500 W BLDC hub motor; BOM < ₹4000; Arduino Mega; SSD1306 OLED.
supporting_fact_titles: Anti-lock Braking System (ABS) — Wheel Slip Control
design_element_titles: Regenerative Braking System with Power Monitor Display
BLDC Regenerative Braking Energy Recovery System
SCT-013 Split-Core CT Clamp Current Sensing

element_usage_notes.Regenerative Braking System with Power M: INA226 measures regen power; SSD1306 OLED shows Wh recovered per trip.
element_usage_notes.BLDC Regenerative Braking Energy Recover: Hub motor switches to generator mode on brake lever Hall sensor trigger.
